beats.caption: I sequenced the screen so identity comes first, proof next, the one action last.
Inter in, muted labels, one filled button — the eye lands on Save changes.
Every gap and color reads from a token on the 8px grid.
'Save' becomes 'Save changes' so the click is never a gamble.
One hover-lift and press-scale so the whole card speaks one language.

framing.hookSub: Not one AI voice — watch the whole design team work.
framing.briefCaption: Times New Roman. No spacing. One flat gray Save button, lost.
framing.revealCaption: Same page. The whole team later.
framing.endHeadline: Your turn to run the team.
framing.endSub: 26 roles redesign your screen, live. One command.
